title: Why Trump reversed course to fast-track psychedelic drugs for mental healthcare
summary: President Trump is advancing federal support for psychedelic drug research as mental health treatments, a shift that opens new therapeutic avenues but raises regulatory and safety considerations.
content: President Donald Trump is trying to fast-track research into psychedelics as treatments, creating new opportunities and risks.

zh.title: 特朗普为何扭转立场加快推进迷幻药物心理健康治疗
zh.summary: 特朗普总统正在推进联邦对迷幻药物研究作为心理健康治疗的支持，这一转变开启了新的治疗途径，但也引发了监管和安全方面的考虑。

title: Top Wall Street analysts see robust growth potential in these 3 stocks
summary: Top Wall Street analysts have identified three stocks with significant growth potential, particularly appealing to investors seeking exposure to the artificial intelligence sector.
content: Investors keen on capitalizing on the AI boom can track recommendations from top Wall Street analysts

zh.title: 顶级华尔街分析师看好这3只股票的强劲增长潜力
zh.summary: 顶级华尔街分析师已确定了三只具有显著增长潜力的股票，特别吸引了寻求接触人工智能领域的投资者。

title: Want to buy a small business? A business acquisition loan could help
summary: Business acquisition loans provide financing for entrepreneurs purchasing small businesses, with the article detailing how these loans work and identifying available lenders.
content: Here's how business acquisiton loans work and where you can get one.

zh.title: 想要购买小企业？企业并购贷款可以帮助您
zh.summary: 企业并购贷款为购买小企业的创业者提供融资，文章详细说明了这些贷款的工作方式，并列举了可用的贷方。

title: ‘He threatened to cut the roots’: A tree fell onto my neighbor’s property during a storm. Then all hell broke loose.
summary: A tree toppled during a storm onto a neighbor's property, causing approximately $6,000 in damages and sparking a dispute between the property owners.
content: “The neighbor estimates damage from the tree at approximately $6,000 or more.”

zh.title: "他威胁要砍根"：暴风雨中一棵树倒在了我邻居的房产上。之后一切都变糟了。
zh.summary: 暴风雨期间，一棵树倒在邻居的房产上，造成约6000美元的损失，并引发了房产所有人之间的纠纷。

title: Disney is poised to ramp its already booming advertising business. Rita Ferro is behind the push
summary: Disney is expanding advertising revenue by securing premium ad placements during major 2027 events including the Super Bowl, Oscars, and Grammys, with global ad president Rita Ferro leading the initiative.
content: Disney is selling ads for the Super Bowl, Oscars and Grammys in 2027, all major advertising revenue drivers. Global ad president Rita Ferro is leading the charge.

zh.title: 迪士尼准备加快其已经繁荣的广告业务。Rita Ferro 是这一推动的幕后推手
zh.summary: 迪士尼通过在2027年的主要活动（包括超级碗、奥斯卡和格莱美奖）期间获得优质广告位置来扩展广告收入，全球广告总裁Rita Ferro领导这一举措。

title: Defense spending, China in Asia and lessons from Ukraine: Takeways from the 2026 IISS Shangri-La Dialogue
summary: The 2026 IISS Shangri-La Dialogue summit in Singapore convened world leaders and defense officials from May 29-31 to discuss defense spending, China's regional role, and lessons from the Ukraine conflict.
content: The summit sees top world leaders, defence officials and key executives gathering in Singapore from May 29 to 31

zh.title: 国防开支、亚洲的中国和乌克兰的教训：2026年国际战略研究所香格里拉对话的要点
zh.summary: 2026年国际战略研究所香格里拉对话峰会在新加坡召集了世界领导人和国防官员，于5月29日至31日讨论国防开支、中国的地区角色以及乌克兰冲突的教训。

title: Japan seeks candid dialog, defense minister says, rejecting 'neo-militarism' claims
summary: Japan's defense minister calls for transparency and dialogue to address regional tensions, refuting claims of neo-militarism. This diplomatic approach reflects Japan's strategy to ease geopolitical concerns in the region.
content: Koizumi calls for transparency and dialog as he addresses tensions in the region.

zh.title: 日本寻求坦诚对话，防长拒绝'新军国主义'指控
zh.summary: 日本防长呼吁透明度和对话以解决地区紧张局势，驳斥新军国主义指控。这种外交方式反映了日本缓解地区地缘政治顾虑的战略。
